meta_title: For Freelancers: debugging with AI to Solve can't scale projects (Beginner Case Study)
meta_description: Learn how to debugging with AI and overcome can't scale projects. A Beginner-level Case Study using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Debugging with AI to Scale Projects
content.seo_description: Learn how to use AI debugging to overcome scaling bottlenecks. A beginner-level case study using Antigravity and Claude Code to ship faster and impress clients.
content.answer_block: To scale your freelance projects, stop debugging manually. By integrating Antigravity for architectural oversight and Claude Code for CLI-based automation, you reduce resolution time by 70%. This workflow allows you to maintain high-quality codebases while handling multiple client projects simultaneously, transforming your technical debt into a competitive advantage.
content.intro:
The midnight oil is burning, your client is expecting a feature push by morning, and your codebase has devolved into a labyrinth of race conditions and cryptic stack traces. You are stuck in the 'Freelancer’s Trap': the more projects you take on, the more time you spend fighting fires instead of building value. Scaling isn't just about working harder; it is about automating the cognitive load of debugging.

Today, we shift your workflow from manual forensic analysis to AI-driven remediation. By leveraging the synthesis of Antigravity’s structural analysis and the raw power of Claude Code, you will transform your terminal into a high-octane development engine. It is time to reclaim your nights and scale your output.

steps.title: Establish Architectural Context with Antigravity
steps.description: Before fixing bugs, you must understand the dependency graph. Antigravity maps your project structure, identifying circular dependencies that often cause those 'impossible' bugs.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the current project directory for circular dependencies and tight coupling patterns that could impede scaling. Output a summary of the most fragile modules.

steps.title: Isolate the Failure Point
steps.description: Use Claude Code to parse logs and isolate the specific function causing the runtime error, bypassing the need for manual console logging.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Identify the root cause of the recent runtime error in the auth module by cross-referencing log patterns with the current codebase structure.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run "Analyze the error logs in /logs and identify the specific file causing the crash."

steps.title: Automated Refactoring
steps.description: Once the bug is identified, instruct Claude Code to apply a fix while adhering to your project's existing style guidelines.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a refactored version of the identified module that resolves the race condition while maintaining compatibility with the existing API interface.
steps.claude_code_command: claude fix --file src/auth.ts --issue "race condition in async login"

steps.title: Validate with Regression Testing
steps.description: Ensure your fix doesn't break other features by generating a suite of unit tests specifically targeting the refactored code.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a comprehensive test suite for the newly refactored module to ensure no regressions in login flow or data persistence.

steps.title: Final Deployment Audit
steps.description: Before pushing to production, perform a final security and performance audit using Antigravity to ensure the new code meets enterprise standards.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Run a final security audit on the modified code and suggest any performance optimizations for high-concurrency environments.

pro_tips: Use Claude Code's 'memory' feature to store client-specific coding standards so you never have to repeat formatting instructions.
Always run Antigravity scans before client handoffs to ensure documentation is automatically updated and accurate.
Pipe your terminal history into Claude Code to debug complex command-line interaction issues instantly.
Configure custom aliases for your most frequent Antigravity commands to shave seconds off every debugging session.
Treat your AI interactions as a 'pair programming' session; always ask for an explanation of the logic, not just the code patch.
content.next_steps: After completing this workflow, begin integrating these AI tools into your CI/CD pipeline to automate the debugging process even further, effectively moving from reactive to proactive maintenance.
content.conversion_block: You now have the technical blueprint to stop fighting your code and start scaling your freelance business. Stop wasting hours on manual debugging and start delivering high-impact solutions that clients love. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.

acceptedAnswer.text: Before fixing bugs, you must understand the dependency graph. Antigravity maps your project structure, identifying circular dependencies that often cause those 'impossible' bugs.
Use Claude Code to parse logs and isolate the specific function causing the runtime error, bypassing the need for manual console logging.
Once the bug is identified, instruct Claude Code to apply a fix while adhering to your project's existing style guidelines.
Ensure your fix doesn't break other features by generating a suite of unit tests specifically targeting the refactored code.
Before pushing to production, perform a final security and performance audit using Antigravity to ensure the new code meets enterprise standards.
